title: Rolling Old Release User
objective: A generated old-release-shaped user state for rolling upgrade scenarios, with legacy markers seeded before the source runtime is resolved.

setup.title: Write Rolling Old Release Markers
setup.intent: Create legacy state markers before the rolling source-runtime phase binds the clone to a resolved published release.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,"config"),{recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,"plugins"),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,"config","version.json"),JSON.stringify({schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.old-release.v1",release:"2026.4.20",channel:"stable"},null,2)); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,"plugins","legacy-index.json"),JSON.stringify({plugins:["browser","openai","anthropic"]},null,2));'
evidence: legacy version marker exists before rolling source runtime
legacy plugin index exists before rolling source runtime

setupEvidence: legacy version marker exists before rolling source runtime
legacy plugin index exists before rolling source runtime
cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes state fixture files

source.note: legacy markers are written only before resolving the rolling source runtime
